nasb.text: Thus you are to be holy to Me, for I the Lord am holy; and I have set you apart from the peoples to be Mine.

esv.text: You shall be holy to me, for I the Lord am holy and have separated you from the peoples, that you should be mine.

cnv.text: 你們要歸我為聖，因為我耶和華是聖潔的，我把你們從萬民中分別出來，使你們歸我。

ccb.text: 你们要圣洁，因为我耶和华是圣洁的。我把你们跟万族分开，使你们做我的子民。
